tool: bun test + curl + docker compose exec

commands.evidence: 18 tests passed covering webSearch, httpFetch, timelineLookup, searchUtils, and cross-area integration.
Returned HTTP 200 application/json with a results array from SearXNG.

commands.command: docker compose exec dana bun -e <network probes>
commands.evidence: Dana container reached SearXNG over Docker DNS, Jina Reader over HTTPS, localhost:3000, and exposed SEARXNG_URL=http://searxng:8080.
10 rapid successive requests all returned HTTP 200, confirming limiter disabled in practice.
Mounted config showed search formats html/json and server.limiter: false.

commands.command: docker compose exec dana bun -e persistence marker && docker compose down/up --wait
commands.evidence: Temporary file /data/user-testing-persist.txt survived compose recreation, verifying bind-mounted data persistence.

commands.command: docker compose exec dana bun -e dependency imports
commands.evidence: cheerio, linkedom, @mozilla/readability, and turndown imported successfully inside the Dana container.
Compose file rendered successfully with dana and searxng services and shared network.

frictions: Dana container does not include curl; container-internal HTTP probes must use bun -e fetch instead.
